title: ContourLoad
description: ContourLoad: Load to be applied over a region defined by a closed planar Polyline.

Loadcase.description: The Loadcase in which the load is applied. Loadcase: Basic load case class. All load classes need to point to one Loadcase.

Axis.description: Defines whether the load is applied in local or global coordinates.

Projected.description: If true the load is projected to the region.

Force.description: Force per area to be applied to the region. Property has a quantity of type Pressure measured in [Pa]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Contour.description: Closed planar polyline enclosing the region to be loaded. Polyline: A curve consisting of a continuous chain of straight line segments. The Polyline is considered closed if the first and last ControlPoints are coincident.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
